news_items.title: AI programs are struggling to retain users - Zamin.uz
news_items.summary: Although artificial intelligence technologies are gaining popularity in the app market, they are losing to regular apps in retaining users long-term. According to a new report by RevenueCat, even though AI-powered apps generate good revenue in the initial stage, subscribers abandon them faster...
